name: Tomato Brushetta, Lo Cal
recipeIngredient: 8 slices of French or Italian bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread.
2. Rub one side of hot toast with cut side of a garlic clove.
3. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat; add onion and cook, stirring until tender.
4. Add tomato, oregano, and pepper to the skillet, stir.
5. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the garlic side of the toasted bread.
6. Serve immediately. Alternatively, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and broil for 1 minute.
Per serving (2 slices): 105 cal; 2 g fat; 1 mg cholesterol; 190 mg salt.
